name: Crystal Beast Topaz Tiger
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>宝</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ほう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>玉</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぎょく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> トパーズ・タイガー
desc: If this card attacks an opponent's monster, it gains 400 ATK during the Damage Step only. If this face-up card is destroyed in a Monster Zone, you can place it face-up in your Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Spell, instead of sending it to the GY.
mnst_eff: If this card attacks an opponent's monster, it gains 400 ATK during the Damage Step only. If this face-up card is destroyed in a Monster Zone, you can place it face-up in your Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Spell, instead of sending it to the GY.
eff: If this card attacks an opponent's monster, it gains 400 ATK during the Damage Step only. If this face-up card is destroyed in a Monster Zone, you can place it face-up in your Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Spell, instead of sending it to the GY.

action: Places itself in Spell & Trap Zone
Places destroyed cards in Spell & Trap Zone
